metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5455
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1: NCKX2 (SLC24A2) interacts with KIF21A in yeast two-hybrid and immunoprecipitation assays.

Figure 2c,d: "We performed immunocytochemistry on cultured hippocampal neurons expressing FLAG-KIF21A. Triple immunostaining with anti-FLAG, anti-NCKX2ext and anti-NF-H revealed that endogenous NCKX2 was colocalized with FLAG-KIF21A at the axon"

Figure 2g: "The line profiles of NCKX2 (green) and FLAG-KIF21A (red) fluorescence intensities as well as the PDM image demonstrate that the NCKX2/FLAG-KIF21A complexes are localized in puncta along the axon fiber and in the axon terminal"

Figure 3: Axonal transport of NCKX2 is mediated by KIF21A.

Figure 4: Knockdown of KIF21A abolishes the axonal transport of NCKX2.

Figure 5: Knockdown of KIF21A alters calcium kinetics at the axon terminal.. Experimental description: M&M: "In brief, 2 weeks before neuronal culture, astrocytes were obtained by passing a cortical cell suspension from postnatal day 1 (P1) Sprague Dawley (SD) rat of either sex through a cell strainer (40 μm mesh; Falcon; BD Biosciences Discovery Labware), and then cultured"

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
